OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CHECKFIRST_API_URL.description: Base URL for the API endpoint (e.g., https://api.example.com).

CHECKFIRST_API_KEY.description: API key for authentication (sent in Api-Key header).

CHECKFIRST_SINCE.description: Only ingest articles published on or after this date. Accepts ISO 8601 absolute dates (e.g., 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z) or durations relative to now (e.g., P365D, P1Y, P6M, P4W). Defaults to 1 year ago.

CHECKFIRST_FORCE_REPROCESS.description: If true, ignore any saved connector state and start from page 1. Useful for debugging or re-importing all data.

CHECKFIRST_TLP_LEVEL.description: TLP marking level applied to created STIX entities.

CHECKFIRST_MAX_ROW_BYTES.description: Skip any API row larger than this approximate number of bytes.
